title.en: China-to-Madagascar Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入马达加斯加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入馬達加斯加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Madagascar BNM conformity requirements, ORE licensing and grid-connection rules, JIRAMA utility interconnection conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 220/380 V 50 Hz national grid settings, and off-grid / mini-grid context under ADER rural electrification — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与马达加斯加BNM合格评定要求、ORE许可及并网规则、JIRAMA电力公司互联条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、220/380 V 50 Hz国家电网参数及ADER农村电气化背景下的离网/微电网情况——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004及GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與馬達加斯加BNM合格評定要求、ORE許可及併網規則、JIRAMA電力公司互聯條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、220/380 V 50 Hz國家電網參數及ADER農村電氣化背景下的離網/微電網情況——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004及GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BNM conformity scope determination, ORE licensing approval, JIRAMA grid-connection approval, donor/lender procurement eligibility determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Madagascar BNM technical standards, ORE electricity sector licensing regulations, JIRAMA grid-connection technical conditions, ADER rural electrification requirements, and project-owner or donor/lender specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BNM合格评定范围裁定、ORE许可批准、JIRAMA并网批准、捐赠方/贷款方采购资格认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行马达加斯加BNM技术标准、ORE电力行业许可法规、JIRAMA并网技术条件、ADER农村电气化要求及项目业主或捐赠方/贷款方规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BNM合格評定範圍裁定、ORE許可批准、JIRAMA併網批准、捐贈方/貸款方採購資格認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬達加斯加BNM技術標準、ORE電力行業許可法規、JIRAMA併網技術條件、ADER農村電氣化要求及項目業主或捐贈方/貸款方規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Madagascar, the key practical gaps are: (1) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence — Madagascar through BNM adopts IEC standards; Chinese GB/T 37408 alone is not accepted as equivalent; (2) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance for any grid-tied installation connecting to JIRAMA's 220/380 V 50 Hz network; (3) ORE licensing — any electricity generation project above threshold capacity requires an ORE licence; (4) JIRAMA grid-connection technical review for utility-interconnected systems; (5) for off-grid and rural mini-grid projects, ADER programme requirements and donor/lender quality standards (e.g. VeraSol/Lighting Global for smaller systems) apply as separate gates. Madagascar's national grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) is nominally the same as China's, reducing firmware re-parameterisation risk, but IEC compliance evidence — not Chinese GB/T certificates — is the accepted documentary basis for regulatory submissions and donor-financed projects.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口马达加斯加时，主要实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据——马达加斯加通过BNM采用IEC标准；仅凭中国GB/T 37408不被接受为等效依据；（2）任何接入JIRAMA 220/380 V 50 Hz电网的并网装置须符合IEC 62116防孤岛要求；（3）ORE许可——任何超过容量阈值的发电项目须取得ORE许可；（4）并网系统须通过JIRAMA并网技术审查；（5）对于离网和农村微电网项目，ADER计划要求及捐赠方/贷款方质量标准（如小型系统适用的VeraSol/Lighting Global）作为独立门槛适用。马达加斯加国家电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）名义上与中国相同，降低了固件重新参数化风险，但IEC合规证据——而非中国GB/T证书——是监管提交和捐赠方资助项目的公认文件依据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口馬達加斯加時，主要實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據——馬達加斯加通過BNM採用IEC標準；僅憑中國GB/T 37408不被接受為等效依據；（2）任何接入JIRAMA 220/380 V 50 Hz電網的併網裝置須符合IEC 62116防孤島要求；（3）ORE許可——任何超過容量閾值的發電項目須取得ORE許可；（4）併網系統須通過JIRAMA併網技術審查；（5）對於離網和農村微電網項目，ADER計畫要求及捐贈方/貸款方質量標準（如小型系統適用的VeraSol/Lighting Global）作為獨立門檻適用。馬達加斯加國家電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）名義上與中國相同，降低了韌體重新參數化風險，但IEC合規證據——而非中國GB/T證書——是監管提交和捐贈方資助項目的公認文件依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
